signals.headline: HEADLINE:** Powell signals goods inflation should peak Q1 2026 but core PCE inflation stuck at 2
signals.raw:
HEADLINE:** Powell signals goods inflation should peak Q1 2026 but core PCE inflation stuck at 2.6% through year-end | YES | HIGH confidence

Core PCE inflation remained at 2.9% in 2025 and is projected to stay at 2.6% by end-2026, barely moving toward the 2% target.[1][3] However, goods inflation—driven primarily by tariffs—should peak around Q1 2026 assuming no additional tariff rounds.[3]
